# cta

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Landing closing CTA band: a short headline and a primary Download button that navigates to the downloads pane.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `Website.Section` "Get started" → `CtaSection`
  - Uses:
    - `apps/website/downloads.downloadsPane`
    - `apps/website/shell.Website`
    - `primitives/css/spacing.Inset`
    - `primitives/css/spacing.Stack`
    - `primitives/css/text.Text`
    - `primitives/css/ui-kit.Button`
    - `primitives/css/ui-kit.ControlSizeProvider`
    - `primitives/pane.useOpenPane`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
